title: NHS England A&E Attendances and Emergency Admissions
short_description: Monthly A&E attendances, emergency admissions and four-hour wait performance for NHS trusts in England.
long_description: NHS England publishes monthly statistics on accident and emergency department activity. Covers total A&E attendances, emergency admissions and performance against the four-hour wait standard by NHS trust. London trusts (UCLH, Barts, KCH, St George's etc.) are identifiable. Data from August 2010. Widely used for NHS capacity and performance analysis.
schema_fields: period|date|Reporting month;org_code|string|NHS organisation code;org_name|string|Trust name;ae_attendances|integer|Total A&E attendances;within_4hrs_pct|float|% seen within 4 hours
sample_rows: 2024-12|RJ1|Guys and St Thomas NHS Foundation Trust|48000|74.2

title: NHS England Referral to Treatment Waiting Times
short_description: Weekly NHS referral to treatment (RTT) waiting time statistics by trust and specialty.
long_description: Weekly statistics on NHS referral to treatment (RTT) pathways measuring the time from GP referral to start of treatment. Data covers the number of patients waiting, median and 92nd percentile waiting times, and performance against the 18-week standard. Published by trust and specialty. London NHS trusts have among the longest waiting lists nationally.
schema_fields: period|date|Reporting period end date;org_code|string|NHS trust code;treatment_function|string|Clinical specialty;total_waiting|integer|Total on incomplete pathway;within_18_weeks_pct|float|% within 18 weeks

title: NHS GP Patient Registrations
short_description: Monthly counts of patients registered at each GP practice in England by age and sex.
long_description: NHS England publishes monthly extracts of the number of patients registered at each GP practice in England, broken down by single year of age and sex. Covers all ~6,500 GP practices. London practices identifiable by ODS code. Used for NHS planning, population modelling and demand forecasting. Data from 2014.
schema_fields: org_code|string|GP practice ODS code;practice_name|string|Practice name;postcode|string|Practice postcode;total_patients|integer|Total registered patients;male_pct|float|% male patients

title: NHS Prescription Cost Analysis
short_description: Annual and monthly prescription dispensing data by drug, quantity and cost for NHS England.
long_description: NHS Business Services Authority publishes annual prescription cost analysis data showing all items dispensed by community pharmacies and dispensing doctors. Includes drug name, BNF code, quantity dispensed, net ingredient cost and number of items. Monthly data available via Open Prescription Data. London CCG/ICB-level breakdowns available.
schema_fields: bnf_code|string|British National Formulary code;bnf_name|string|Drug name;items|integer|Number of prescription items;nic|float|Net ingredient cost £;actual_cost|float|Actual cost to NHS £
notes: Monthly raw data at prescriber level via OpenPrescribing.net

title: TfL Unified API
short_description: Real-time and timetable data for all TfL services: Tube, bus, Overground, DLR, Elizabeth line, cycle hire and roads.
long_description: The Transport for London Unified API provides programmatic access to live arrivals, timetables, disruptions, journey planning, stop points and status across all TfL modes. Endpoints include: arrivals at stops, line status, journey planner, air quality, road disruptions, cycle hire availability and cycle route information. Requires free API key. Widely used by journey planning apps.
schema_fields: line_id|string|TfL line identifier;mode_name|string|Tube/Bus/Elizabeth line etc;destination_name|string|Terminus;time_to_station|integer|Seconds until arrival;vehicle_id|string|Vehicle identifier
notes: Free API key from api.tfl.gov.uk. Rate limits apply.

title: TfL Bus Routes and GTFS Timetables
short_description: GTFS timetable data for all TfL bus routes including stops, schedules and route geometry.
long_description: TfL publishes General Transit Feed Specification (GTFS) data for all bus routes operated in London. Includes stop locations, route geometry, scheduled departure times and service calendars. Updated quarterly. Used by journey planning applications, accessibility tools and transport modellers. Supplementary route performance data also available.
schema_fields: route_id|string|Bus route number;route_long_name|string|Route description;stop_id|string|Bus stop identifier;stop_lat|float|Stop latitude;stop_lon|float|Stop longitude

title: TfL Santander Cycles BikePoint API
short_description: Real-time availability of bikes and docking spaces at all Santander Cycle Hire docking stations in London.
long_description: The TfL BikePoint API provides real-time information on all Santander Cycle Hire docking stations in London. Returns station name, location (lat/lon), total docking points, available bikes, available spaces and whether the station is installed and locked. Over 800 stations. Updates approximately every 2 minutes.

title: OS Open UPRN
short_description: Unique Property Reference Numbers and coordinates for 39+ million properties and addressable objects in Great Britain.
long_description: OS Open UPRN provides the UPRN (Unique Property Reference Number) and grid reference coordinates for every addressable location in Great Britain. Over 39 million records covering residential, commercial, agricultural and other properties. Essential for linking datasets by property address. Released under open licence since 2020. Updated quarterly.
access_method: Free download — OS Data Hub registration required
schema_fields: uprn|integer|Unique Property Reference Number;x_coordinate|float|Easting (BNG);y_coordinate|float|Northing (BNG);latitude|float|WGS84 latitude;longitude|float|WGS84 longitude
notes: Key join field for linking multiple datasets. Critical infrastructure dataset.

title: OS Open Roads
short_description: Network topology data for all roads in Great Britain including road links, nodes, names and classifications.
long_description: OS Open Roads provides a network dataset of all roads in Great Britain with topology (road links, road nodes, routing and road information). Includes road names, road numbers, road classification (motorway, A-road, B-road, minor road) and form of way. Used for route planning, traffic analysis and GIS applications. Updated quarterly.
access_method: Free download — OS Data Hub registration required
schema_fields: identifier|string|Road link GUID;road_name|string|Named road;road_classification|string|Motorway/A Road/B Road/Minor Road;length_m|float|Link length in metres

title: OS Code-Point Open
short_description: Geographic coordinates (centroid) for every postcode unit in Great Britain — 1.7 million postcodes.
long_description: OS Code-Point Open provides the grid reference of the mean position of addresses within each postcode unit in Great Britain. Covers all 1.7 million live postcode units with OS grid coordinates (easting/northing) and WGS84 coordinates. Includes quality indicator, county code, district code and ward code. Essential for postcode-level geographic analysis.
access_method: Free download — OS Data Hub registration required
schema_fields: postcode|string|Unit postcode;positional_quality|integer|Quality indicator (1=address matched to property);easting|integer|OS Grid easting;northing|integer|OS Grid northing;district_code|string|Local authority code

title: Met Office MIDAS Open UK Weather Observations
short_description: Historical weather station observations from 1853 to present across the UK Met Office surface observation network.
long_description: MIDAS Open provides daily and hourly observations from the UK land surface station network, including temperature, rainfall, wind speed, sunshine, humidity and visibility. Available via CEDA (Centre for Environmental Data Analysis). Covers over 5,000 station-years of data. London stations include Heathrow, Kew Gardens, St James's Park and Hampstead. Essential for climate and weather analysis.
schema_fields: src_id|integer|Station identifier;ob_end_time|datetime|Observation end time;air_temperature|float|Air temp °C;wind_speed|float|Mean wind speed m/s;precipitation|float|Precipitation mm
notes: CEDA registration required. London stations: Heathrow (708), Kew (696), St James's Park.

title: HadUK-Grid 1km Gridded Climate Observations
short_description: 1km gridded daily and monthly UK climate data for temperature, rainfall, sunshine and more from 1836 to present.
long_description: HadUK-Grid is a gridded dataset of UK climate variables derived from the Met Office MIDAS station network. Provides 1km resolution daily and monthly grids for: maximum and minimum temperature, mean temperature, precipitation, sunshine, mean wind speed, mean sea level pressure, relative humidity and snow lying. Full UK coverage. Essential for spatial climate analysis and impact modelling.
schema_fields: latitude|float|Grid cell latitude;longitude|float|Grid cell longitude;tasmax|float|Daily maximum temperature °C;tasmin|float|Daily minimum temperature °C;pr|float|Precipitation mm/day
notes: FORMAT: NetCDF — requires specialist software (Python xarray, QGIS). CEDA registration required.

title: DEFRA UK Air Quality Measurements
short_description: Hourly air quality pollutant measurements from the Automatic Urban and Rural Network (AURN) across the UK.
long_description: The Automatic Urban and Rural Network (AURN) operated by DEFRA and agencies provides continuous automated measurements of air quality pollutants from ~300 monitoring stations. Covers NO2, PM2.5, PM10, O3, SO2, CO. London has the densest network in the UK with central London stations (Marylebone Road, Bloomsbury, Eltham). Data available via the UK-AIR website and API.
provider: Department for Environment, Food & Rural Affairs (DEFRA)
schema_fields: site_id|string|Station code;date_time|datetime|Measurement datetime;no2_ugm3|float|NO2 μg/m³;pm25_ugm3|float|PM2.5 μg/m³;pm10_ugm3|float|PM10 μg/m³
notes: London sites include: MY1 (Marylebone Road), BL0 (Bloomsbury), ELT (Eltham).

title: London Gazette Insolvency and Company Notices API
short_description: Structured XML/JSON feed of all statutory insolvency, company and personal notices published in the London Gazette since 1665.
long_description: The London Gazette publishes statutory notices as required by UK law. The Gazette Linked Data API provides programmatic access to all notice types including compulsory liquidations, administrations, CVAs, bankruptcy orders, company dissolution notices, capital reduction notices and public appointments. Notices available as JSON, XML, Atom feed and CSV. Approximately 300,000+ notices per year.
access_method: Free API — no registration for basic access
schema_fields: notice_id|string|Gazette notice identifier;notice_type|string|Insolvency/Company/Personal;entity_name|string|Subject company or person;issue_date|date|Publication date;content|text|Full notice text
sample_rows: 3456789|Winding-Up Order|Acme Trading Ltd|2024-12-15|The Court made a Winding-up Order...
notes: Longitudinal datasets (linked entity data across multiple notices) available under commercial licence.
